---
title: "05 BQSR and HaplotypeCaller"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-10-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Purpose

Run GATK `BaseRecalibrator`, `ApplyBQSR`, and `HaplotypeCaller` to produce
per-sample gVCFs.

# Inputs

- Manifest: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/BQSR/samples.tsv`
- Reference FASTA:
  `/work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/2.refrence/Phytozome/PhytozomeV13/Sbicolor/v5.1/assembly/sorghum_v5.1.fa`
- Known sites:
  `/work/jyanglab/subhash/known_sites/known_sites_merged.num.renamed.vcf.gz`

# Outputs

- BQSR tables: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/BQSR/tables/`
- BQSR BAMs: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/BQSR/bam/`
- gVCFs: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/BQSR/gvcf/`

# Script

- `scripts/05_bqsr_haplotypecaller/BQSR_array.sh`

# Run

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
cd /work/jyanglab/subhash/BQSR
sbatch --array=1-876 BQSR_array.sh
```
